/usr/bin/c++ -pthread CMakeFiles/mion_render_stress.dir/tools/render_stress_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_render_stress.dir/src/core/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_render_stress.dir/src/core/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_render_stress.dir/src/core/register_scenes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_render_stress.dir/src/vendor/stb_image_impl.cpp.o -o mion_render_stress  _deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.a -lm
